transcript: Speaker A: English la thadumarum podhu oru padhatam oru bayam face pannirkingala? Indha bayathalaye pesa vendiya neriya situations la apdiye amaidhiya irundhururom... [Have you faced tension or fear when struggling with English? Because of this fear, we stay silent in many situations where we need to speak. Kids in big schools speak effortlessly because they have a practice environment. You can get that environment in the MySivi app. It has AI training and real partners. If you don't know English, use AI teachers. If you know English but struggle with fluency, practice with co-learners. No one will laugh at your mistakes. Speak English fluently in just two weeks. Download MySivi now for just ₹3.]
on_screen_text: English la [In English], padhatam [Tension], MySivi, Super Environment, AI Training, Co-learner Calls, Learning Path, Join today for Just ₹3, SUCCESS
summary: The ad addresses the fear of speaking English and staying silent due to hesitation. It introduces the MySivi app, highlighting its AI teachers for beginners and co-learner practice calls for building fluency without judgment. The call to action invites users to download the app for just ₹3 to speak fluently in two weeks.
